title: rosa coriifolia var. langei
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. langei, also known as the Chinese rose or Japanese rose, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Rosa coriifolia var. langei is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can be dried or used as a fresh herb in traditional medicine practices.
benefits: Rosa coriifolia var. langei has many benefits, such as its potential to improve cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties that can alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. This plant has also been shown to possess antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various infections and wounds, and its antioxidant properties can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Furthermore, Rosa coriifolia var. langei has been found to have a positive impact on mental health, with its adaptogenic properties helping to reduce stress and anxiety levels, and its sedative effects promoting a good night's sleep. By incorporating this plant into one's life, individuals can experience improved overall well-being, increased energy levels, and a reduced risk of chronic diseases, ultimately leading to a longer and healthier life.
actions: Rosa coriifolia var. langei has many therapeutic actions, such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which help to reduce inflammation, protect against oxidative stress, prevent infections, and fight fungal diseases. These properties also exhibit analgesic and anti-hemorrhagic effects, providing relief from pain and controlling excessive bleeding. By treating conditions like eczema, acne, and wounds, rosa coriifolia var. langei improves skin health, reducing the risk of infections and promoting faster healing, thereby enhancing daily life and overall well-being. Additionally, its antiseptic and antiviral actions help to prevent the spread of diseases, making it a valuable resource in public health efforts.
intro_study: According to "Scientific reports", rosa coriifolia var. langei benefits include its antioxidant and free-radical scavenger properties, which are beneficial in skincare and nutrition.
constituents: Rosa coriifolia var. langei has many active constituents, such as flavonoids (like quercetin and kaempferol), phenolic acids (including ferulic and caffeic acid), and terpenoids (including ursolic and oleanolic acid), which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. These medicinal constituents have been shown to improve people's daily lives by reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, improving cardiovascular health by lowering cholesterol levels and preventing the formation of blood clots, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against a range of pathogens, including bacteria and fungi. Additionally, the phenolic acids present in Rosa coriifolia var. langei have been found to have anti-cancer properties, inhibiting the growth of cancer cells and inducing apoptosis, or programmed cell death. Overall, the bioactive compounds found in Rosa coriifolia var. langei make it a promising candidate for the development of new medicines and therapies to improve human health and well-being.
